---
title: "People"
listing:
  - id: current-members
    contents:
      - "*.qmd"
      - "!alumni/**"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    sort: "sortorder"
    fields: [image, title, description]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: alumni
    contents: "alumni/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    sort: "sortorder"
    fields: [image, title, description]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

## Current members

::: {#current-members}
:::

## Alumni

::: {#alumni}
:::
